bibliography:
A escolha da bibliografia depende do tema escolhido e constitui um dos trabalhos a realizar pelo

candidato de forma a alicerçar o tema da sua Dissertação.
objectives:
Consolidate the choice of the dissertation theme

Develop and structure the Dissertation plan

Develop the state of the art scientifically framing the topic addressed

Develop the candidates' research capacity regarding the scientific and technological areas

framed in the Dissertation theme

Carry out the technological implementation or fieldwork corresponding to the proof of concept of

the defended purpose

Defend the Thesis Plan before the jury that will follow the candidate's path to the defense of the

Doctoral Thesis
organicUnit: ECATI - School of Communication, Architecture, Arts and Information Technologies
programme:
The syllabus is defined in each case according to the topic chosen by the candidate based on his/her

research work and suggestions from the supervisor.
presentation:
Thesis Planning is a course aimed at first-year PhD students. The syllabus is defined in each case

according to the topic chosen by the candidate based on his/her research work and suggestions from the

supervisor.
avaliacao:
A avaliação da disciplina inclui:

1) Avaliação do relatório escrito (40% da nota final)

2) Avaliação da apresentação do plano de tese (30% da nota final)

3) Avaliação da discussão (30% da nota final)
